title: BCCL Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
post_name: Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary)
short_info: Bharat Coking Coal Limited (BCCL) Recruitment 2026: Bharat Coking Coal Limited has released the official notification for 2 Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Jharkhand. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid PSU jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years as on 01-04-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Passed Executive program and completed the Executive Development Programme from Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI).
qualification.details: Completed and passed Executive program and the required period of Executive Development Programme from Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) as on the crucial date. Candidates who have already completed their Management Training need not to apply.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary)

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications based on documents/certificates uploaded. Merit list will be drawn by arranging the passing percentage of Executive program of ICSI in descending order. Tie-breaking criteria: first by preferring candidate who passed earlier in executive program
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BCCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BCCL Executive Programme exam passed Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BCCL Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary) recruitment is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this BCCL trainee position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed and passed the Executive program and the required period of Executive Development Programme from the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) to be eligible for this training program.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the BCCL Executive Programme exam passed Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for these trainee positions is 28 years as of 1st April 2026. Age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Executive Programme exam passed Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary) position in Bharat Coking Coal Limited (BCCL).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the BCCL Executive Programme exam passed Trainee role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 22,000/- per month during their practical training period as an Executive Programme exam passed Trainee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for the BCCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the BCCL Executive Programme exam passed Trainee recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official BCCL website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this BCCL trainee position?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a scrutiny of applications and a merit list prepared by arranging the passing percentages of the ICSI Executive program in descending order. Tie-breaking criteria are also defined.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates who have already completed their Management Training apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who have already completed their Management Training from ICSI are not eligible to apply for this specific training program.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the BCCL located, and where will the training be conducted?
faq.answer: Bharat Coking Coal Limited (BCCL) is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand. The training will likely be conducted at their facilities in Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the practical training for the Company Secretary Trainee?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a practical training of Company Secretary, which is typically for a period of 21 months, as indicated in the brief description.
